message.content: the checkout error dashboard just paged me, ref incident INC-2291, started ~14:02 UTC. can you help me dig into payments-service and figure out what's going on

here's the error spike:
TaxCalculationError: rate table missing for region 'EU'
  at calculateTax (src/tax/calculator.ts:88)
  at checkoutHandler (src/checkout/handler.ts:41)
started exactly at 14:02, ramped to ~40% of EU checkouts within 6 minutes
That timing lines up with a deploy. Checking recent rollouts.
yeah found it - the feature flag `enable-new-tax-calc` rollout config had a typo, someone set rollout_percentage to 100 instead of 5. it went to 100% of traffic instead of the intended 5% canary
Got it. Reverting the flag to 0% immediately to stop the bleeding, then we can fix the rollout script properly.
reverted the flag, error rate dropped back to baseline within 2 minutes. now let's fix the actual rollout script so this typo class of bug can't happen again

The rollout script (scripts/flag_rollout.py) takes a raw percentage as a CLI int arg with no bounds checking and no distinction between canary-stage and full-rollout calls. I'll add validation: reject anything outside 0-100, and require an explicit --stage=canary|full flag so a canary call can never silently apply to 100% of traffic.

Added validation to scripts/flag_rollout.py: rollout_percentage must be 0-100, and canary calls are now capped at 10% max regardless of the value passed. Committed as a1b2c3d fix tax calc rollout percentage and harden rollout script validation.
good. also the new tax calc logic itself was missing an EU rate table entirely, not just an over-rollout issue right? let's make sure that gets fixed too before we re-enable the flag

Confirmed - src/tax/rates/eu.json didn't exist yet, only us.json and uk.json were populated. The new calculator code assumed all three existed. Added eu.json with the correct VAT rates per country, and added a startup check that fails fast if any configured region is missing its rate file, so this can't ship silently again.
nice, re-enable the flag at the proper 5% canary now
Re-enabled enable-new-tax-calc at 5% via the hardened rollout script (scripts/flag_rollout.py --stage=canary --percentage=5). Error rate holding at baseline after 20 minutes of canary traffic.
